feed.title: BCD-watch: Changes Report (weekly)
feed.subtitle: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jun 22 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 15 June 2026 through Monday, 22 June 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +89, -0

Support increases (89)

API

  1. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_inbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_outbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_remote-inbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_remote-outbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ dtlsCipher
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ dtlsRole
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ dtlsState
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ iceLocalUsernameFragment
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ iceRole
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ iceState
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ id
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ selectedCandidatePairId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ srtpCipher
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ timestamp
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ tlsVersion
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ type
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ Element ➞ scroll ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ Element ➞ scrollBy ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ Element ➞ scrollIntoView ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ Element ➞ scrollTo ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  22. api ➞ Window ➞ scroll ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ Window ➞ scrollBy ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ Window ➞ scrollTo ➞ returns_promise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Suspending ➞ Suspending
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Suspending
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. webassembly ➞ api ➞ promising_static
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ domContentLoaded_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ downloadEnd_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ downloadWillBegin_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ fragmentNavigated_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ historyUpdated_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ load_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ navigationCommitted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ navigationFailed_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ navigationStarted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ userPromptClosed_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ userPromptOpened_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ input ➞ fileDialogOpened_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ authRequired_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ beforeRequestSent_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ fetchError_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ responseCompleted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  17. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ responseStarted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ script ➞ realmCreated_event ➞ userContext_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ MessageSender ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getAllFrames ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getAllFrames ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getFrame ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getFrame ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onBeforeNavigate ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCommitted ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCommitted ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCompleted ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCompleted ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onDOMContentLoaded ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onDOMContentLoaded ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onHistoryStateUpdated ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  16. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onHistoryStateUpdated ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  17. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onReferenceFragmentUpdated ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  18. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onReferenceFragmentUpdated ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  19. webextensions ➞ api ➞ proxy ➞ onRequest ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. webextensions ➞ api ➞ proxy ➞ onRequest ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  21. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ getContexts ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  22. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ getDocumentId
    Added to Firefox,Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  23. webextensions ➞ api ➞ scripting ➞ InjectionTarget ➞ documentIds
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  24. webextensions ➞ api ➞ scripting ➞ executeScript ➞ InjectionResult ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  25. webextensions ➞ api ➞ tabs ➞ connect ➞ connectInfo ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  26. webextensions ➞ api ➞ tabs ➞ sendMessage ➞ options ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  27. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onAuthRequired ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  28. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onAuthRequired ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  29. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRedirect ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  30. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRedirect ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  31. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRequest ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  32. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRequest ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  33. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  34. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  35. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onCompleted ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  36. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onCompleted ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  37. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  38. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  39. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onHeadersReceived ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  40. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onHeadersReceived ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  41. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onResponseStarted ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  42. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onResponseStarted ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  43. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  44. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 92

Show all 92 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (23)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 12 June 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ ServiceWorkerRegistration ➞ showNotification ➞ options_actions_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ keySystemConfiguration
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type ➞ webrtc_option
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type ➞ transmission_option
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type ➞ webrtc_option
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ MediaSession ➞ setActionHandler ➞ callback
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ MediaSession ➞ setActionHandler ➞ callback ➞ enterPictureInPictureReason
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ MediaSession ➞ setActionHandler ➞ enterpictureinpicture_type
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ WebSocket ➞ local_network_access
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ WebTransport ➞ local_network_access
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ WindowClient ➞ navigate ➞ local_network_access
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ keyframes ➞ named_range_keyframes
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ appearance ➞ base-select
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ appearance ➞ base-select ➞ multiple_dropdown
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ appearance ➞ base-select ➞ single_dropdown
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ word-break ➞ auto-phrase
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ color-mix ➞ variadic_color_arguments
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ light-dark ➞ image_value
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines

MEDIATYPES

  1. mediatypes ➞ image ➞ jxl
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

New entries (68)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 12 June 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ scroll ➞ returns_promise
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ scrollBy ➞ returns_promise
  3. api ➞ Element ➞ scrollIntoView ➞ returns_promise
  4. api ➞ Element ➞ scrollTo ➞ returns_promise
  5. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter
  6. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ keySystemConfiguration
  7. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type
  8. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type ➞ webrtc_option
  9. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter
  10. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type
  11. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type ➞ transmission_option
  12. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ encodingInfo ➞ configuration_parameter ➞ type ➞ webrtc_option
  13. api ➞ MediaSession ➞ setActionHandler ➞ callback
  14. api ➞ MediaSession ➞ setActionHandler ➞ callback ➞ enterPictureInPictureReason
  15. api ➞ MediaSession ➞ setActionHandler ➞ enterpictureinpicture_type
  16. api ➞ WebSocket ➞ local_network_access
  17. api ➞ WebTransport ➞ local_network_access
  18. api ➞ Window ➞ scroll ➞ returns_promise
  19. api ➞ Window ➞ scrollBy ➞ returns_promise
  20. api ➞ Window ➞ scrollTo ➞ returns_promise
  21. api ➞ WindowClient ➞ navigate ➞ local_network_access

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Suspending ➞ Suspending
  2. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Suspending
  3. webassembly ➞ api ➞ promising_static

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ domContentLoaded_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ downloadEnd_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  3. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ downloadWillBegin_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  4. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ fragmentNavigated_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  5. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ historyUpdated_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  6. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ load_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  7. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ navigationCommitted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  8. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ navigationFailed_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  9. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ navigationStarted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  10. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ userPromptClosed_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  11. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ userPromptOpened_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  12. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ input ➞ fileDialogOpened_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  13. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ authRequired_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  14. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ beforeRequestSent_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  15. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ fetchError_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  16. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ responseCompleted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  17. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ network ➞ responseStarted_event ➞ userContext_parameter
  18. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ script ➞ realmCreated_event ➞ userContext_parameter

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ proxy ➞ onRequest ➞ documentId
  2. webextensions ➞ api ➞ proxy ➞ onRequest ➞ parentDocumentId
  3. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ getContexts ➞ documentId
  4. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ getDocumentId
  5. webextensions ➞ api ➞ scripting ➞ InjectionTarget ➞ documentIds
  6. webextensions ➞ api ➞ scripting ➞ executeScript ➞ InjectionResult ➞ documentId
  7. webextensions ➞ api ➞ tabs ➞ connect ➞ connectInfo ➞ documentId
  8. webextensions ➞ api ➞ tabs ➞ sendMessage ➞ options ➞ documentId
  9. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onAuthRequired ➞ details ➞ documentId
  10. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onAuthRequired ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  11. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRedirect ➞ details ➞ documentId
  12. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRedirect ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  13. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRequest ➞ details ➞ documentId
  14. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRequest ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  15. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ documentId
  16. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  17. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onCompleted ➞ details ➞ documentId
  18. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onCompleted ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  19. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ details ➞ documentId
  20. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  21. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onHeadersReceived ➞ details ➞ documentId
  22. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onHeadersReceived ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  23. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onResponseStarted ➞ details ➞ documentId
  24. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onResponseStarted ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
  25. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ documentId
  26. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId

Removed entries (1)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 12 June 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

API

  1. api ➞ MediaCapabilities ➞ decodingInfo ➞ configuration_keySystemConfiguration_parameter
  • Previous report: Monday, 15 June 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.3 (Friday, 12 June 2026) and v8.0.4 (Friday, 19 June 2026)

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jun 15 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 8 June 2026 through Monday, 15 June 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +9, -0

Support increases (9)

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ userScripts ➞ execute
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. webextensions ➞ api ➞ contextualIdentities ➞ getSupportedColors
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. webextensions ➞ api ➞ contextualIdentities ➞ getSupportedIcons
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ DomainEncoding
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ getDomain
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ getKnownSuffix
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ isKnownSuffix
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. webextensions ➞ manifest ➞ optional_permissions ➞ publicSuffix
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 19

Show all 19 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

New entries (8)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 5 June 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ contextualIdentities ➞ getSupportedColors
  2. webextensions ➞ api ➞ contextualIdentities ➞ getSupportedIcons
  3. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ DomainEncoding
  4. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix
  5. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ getDomain
  6. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ getKnownSuffix
  7. webextensions ➞ api ➞ publicSuffix ➞ isKnownSuffix
  8. webextensions ➞ manifest ➞ optional_permissions ➞ publicSuffix

Removed entries (11)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 5 June 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

API

  1. api ➞ Gamepad ➞ secure_context_required
  2. api ➞ GamepadButton ➞ secure_context_required
  3. api ➞ GamepadEvent ➞ secure_context_required
  4. api ➞ GamepadHapticActuator ➞ secure_context_required
  5. api ➞ GamepadPose ➞ secure_context_required
  6. api ➞ HTMLMarqueeElement ➞ bounce_event
  7. api ➞ HTMLMarqueeElement ➞ finish_event
  8. api ➞ HTMLMarqueeElement ➞ start_event
  9. api ➞ Navigator ➞ getGamepads ➞ secure_context_required
  10. api ➞ SVGAElement ➞ text
  11. api ➞ SVGRenderingIntent
  • Previous report: Monday, 8 June 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.2 (Friday, 5 June 2026) and v8.0.3 (Friday, 12 June 2026)

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jun 08 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 1 June 2026 through Monday, 8 June 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +23, -0

Support increases (23)

API

  1. api ➞ CSSContainerRule ➞ conditions
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Request ➞ destination ➞ text
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Request ➞ isReloadNavigation
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ SVGTextPathElement ➞ side
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ available_static ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_quality_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ install_static ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_quality_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ background-clip ➞ border-area
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ background ➞ border-area
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ flex-flow ➞ balance
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ flex-line-count
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ flex-wrap ➞ balance
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ overscroll-behavior ➞ chain
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ overscroll-behavior-block ➞ chain
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ overscroll-behavior-inline ➞ chain
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ overscroll-behavior-x ➞ chain
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ overscroll-behavior-y ➞ chain
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ text-fit
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ text-fit ➞ grow
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ text-fit ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ text-fit ➞ shrink
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ includes
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. javascript ➞ statements ➞ import ➞ import_attributes ➞ type_text
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ emulation ➞ setLocaleOverride ➞ dedicated_and_shared_workers
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 97

Show all 97 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (43)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Saturday, 30 May 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ WEBGL_compressed_texture_etc
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ WEBGL_compressed_texture_etc1
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ available_static ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ available_static ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_langs_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ available_static ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_processLocally_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ install_static ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ install_static ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_langs_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ SpeechRecognition ➞ install_static ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_processLocally_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getCalendars
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getCollations
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getHourCycles
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getNumberingSystems
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getTextInfo
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getTimeZones
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ getWeekInfo
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

SVG

  1. svg ➞ elements ➞ a ➞ download
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ supports ➞ at-rule
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-cap ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-cap-end ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-cap-start ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-end ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-junction ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-junction-end ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-junction-start ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-start ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ container ➞ name-only_queries
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ container-name ➞ name-only_queries
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ container-type ➞ name-only_queries
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule-inset ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule-inset-cap ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule-inset-cap-end ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  17. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule-inset-cap-start ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule-inset-end ➞ overlap-join

  19. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule-inset-junction ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  27. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-inset-start ➞ overlap-join
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (54)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Saturday, 30 May 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ Request ➞ destination ➞ text

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jun 01 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 25 May 2026 through Monday, 1 June 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +0, -0

BCD Metadata Changes: 0

Show all 0 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

New entries (0)

No features were added to BCD in this time period.

Removed entries (0)

No features were removed from bcd in this time period
  • Previous report: Monday, 25 May 2026

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon May 25 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 18 May 2026 through Monday, 25 May 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +17, -0

Support increases (17)

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ requestPointerLock ➞ options_unadjustedMovement_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ MathMLElement ➞ nonce
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ finalResponseHeadersStart
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ firstInterimResponseStart
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ RTCEncodedAudioFrame ➞ RTCEncodedAudioFrame ➞ options_metadata_receiveTime_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ RTCEncodedAudioFrame ➞ getMetadata ➞ return_object_property_receiveTime
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ RTCEncodedVideoFrame ➞ RTCEncodedVideoFrame ➞ options_metadata_receiveTime_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ RTCEncodedVideoFrame ➞ getMetadata ➞ return_object_property_receiveTime
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ RTCPeerConnection ➞ RTCPeerConnection ➞ configuration_rtcpMuxPolicy_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ AnimationEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter ➞ pseudoElement_option
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ TransitionEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ field-sizing
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ field-sizing ➞ content
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ field-sizing ➞ fixed
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

MATHML

  1. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a ➞ href
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 12

Show all 12 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (4)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 15 May 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ anchor-name ➞ position_after_layout
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name ➞ scroll
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

New entries (8)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 15 May 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ AnimationEvent ➞ animation
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter
  3. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter ➞ pseudoElement_option
  4. api ➞ TransitionEvent ➞ animation

CSS

  1. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name
  2. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name ➞ scroll

MATHML

  1. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a
  2. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a ➞ href

Removed entries (0)

No features were removed from bcd in this time period
  • Previous report: Monday, 18 May 2026
